ast.name: RaffleRoundV5

structs.name: RefundState

functions.name: merkleRoot
buy

data.then_span:
next_frontier = next_frontier.slice(0, start) + byte[](node) + next_frontier.slice(start + 32, 640);
                    carrying = false;

data.else_span:
sibling = byte[32](frontier.slice(start, start + 32));
                node = sha256(byte[](sibling) + byte[](node));

data.name: validateOutputState

args.span:
{
            max_tickets: max_tickets,

            sold_tickets: sold_tickets + 1,
            ticket_root: node,
            frontier: byte[640](next_frontier),
            refund_cursor: 0,
        }

data.span:
validateOutputState(cov_out_idx, {

functions.name: finalize

data.name: winner_from_seed
data.span: int winner_from_seed = (seed_0 + seed_1 * 128 + seed_2 * 16384 + seed_3 * 2097152) % sold_tickets;

expr.span:
{
